## Summary

Describe the user-visible outcome and why the change is needed.

## Verification

List the checks you ran and any manual acceptance performed.

## Documentation and privacy

- [ ] I reviewed the documentation impact described in `docs/DOCUMENTATION.md`.
- [ ] I updated current guides, in-app help, and release notes where behaviour changed.
- [ ] I removed completed plans and obsolete workarounds rather than presenting them as current guidance.
- [ ] I checked that public files contain no private workspace data, credentials, personal paths, hostnames, or private repository details.
- [ ] I ran the documentation and link checks with the normal test suite.

If an item does not apply, explain why in the summary.
